description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The stUSDS Bounded External Access Module (stUSDS BEAM) manages the parameters of the stUSDS system. Whitelisted operators can use the stUSDS BEAM to modify certain stUSDS parameters without waiting for the GSM Pause Delay. The stUSDS BEAM modifies stUSDS parameters within specified ranges. See [A.4.4.1.3.8 - stUSDS Bounded External Access Module](37f8f82e-7239-4cfb-8f95-d2cc40515cd9).
This functionality allows the Sky Protocol to update stUSDS parameters more quickly than waiting for an Executive Vote and the GSM Pause Delay.
description:
Extra spaces have been removed.

---

The following have been kept unchanged:

- Code blocks/lines have been kept unchanged excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces
  - Interlinear spaces
- Table layouts excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces

Newlines have not been changed.
